# sectionSize

## Summary

Computes the pixel footprint of a section-type table from its rows × cols grid at 34px per seat, clamped to a minimum of 80×60. Used in `components/tsp.gts` to size section blocks on the floor-plan canvas and to enforce the minimum size when resizing them.

## Import

```js
import { sectionSize } from '../utils/index';
```

## Usage

```js
sectionSize(rows: number, cols: number): { w: number; h: number }

sectionSize(3, 4); // { w: 136, h: 102 }
```
